name: Harry Leahey
abstract: Harry F. Leahey (September 1, 1935 — August 12, 1990) was an American jazz guitarist and teacher.

about_quotes.speaker: Phil Woods
about_quotes.evidence: I had Harry Leahey on guitar in the beginning and that was good.
about_quotes.doc_title: Phil Woods — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Eddie Metz Jr.
about_quotes.evidence: It was with Harry Leahey and [Mike] Melillo and Bill Goodwin and all of that. Great quintet.
about_quotes.doc_title: Eddie Metz Jr. interviewed by Monk Rowe, New Hartford, New York, October 3, 2015

about_quotes.speaker: Steve Gilmore
about_quotes.evidence: Harry Leahey had just come on the band... I kind of like that record.
about_quotes.doc_title: Steve Gilmore interviewed by Monk Rowe, Delaware Water Gap, PA, November 8, 1999
